mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAYMENT_EVENT_LOG ( EVENT_TYPE, POS_TRX, ATTEMPT_SEQ, CURRENT_TRX_NO, ORIGINAL_POS_TRX, ORIGINAL_ATTEMPT_SEQ, RESULT_CODE, STATUS_SNAPSHOT, VAN_TRX_ID, APPROVAL_NO, DECLINE_CODE, CORRELATION_ID, NOTE ) VALUES ( #{event.eventType}, #{event.posTrx}, #{event.attemptSeq}, #{event.currentTrxNo}, #{event.originalPosTrx}, #{event.originalAttemptSeq}, #{event.resultCode}, #{event.statusSnapshot}, #{event.vanTrxId}, #{event.approvalNo}, #{event.declineCode}, #{event.correlationId}, #{event.note} )
